allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "& { Get-Process | Sort-Object WorkingSet64 -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Name,Id,@{Name=''RAM_MB'';Expression={[math]::Round\($_WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize }")
